title: Eragrostis scabrida
taxonomy: Eragrostis scabrida is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf structure and flowering patterns. The genus Eragrostis is a group of grasses that are native to various parts of the world, including Africa and Australia. Within the genus, Eragrostis scabrida can be distinguished by its unique combination of features, such as its scabrous leaves and inflorescence structure. Further classification may be possible through more specific examination of its morphology and taxonomy.
